script: for B in emily-claude neil-claude stephanie-claude rosi-claude rosi; do F=/home/azureuser/${B}-responder.py; if [ ! -f $F ]; then echo "========== $B ========== (no source — skip)"; echo; continue; fi; echo "========== $B =========="; D=/home/azureuser/.${B}-bot; A=$D/activities.jsonl; O=$D/outbound.jsonl; E=$D/responder-errors.log; OFF=$D/responder-offset.txt; echo "  responder uptime: $(systemctl show ${B}-responder.service -p ActiveEnterTimestamp --value 2>/dev/null)"; echo "  offset: $(cat $OFF 2>/dev/null)"; if [ -f $A ]; then echo "  inbound: $(wc -l < $A) entries"; tail -2 $A | jq -r '"    ts=" + .ts + " from=" + ((.body|fromjson).from.name // "?")' 2>&1; fi; if [ -f $O ]; then echo "  outbound: $(wc -l < $O) entries"; tail -1 $O | jq -r '"    ts=" + .ts + " preview=" + ((.text // "")[:60])' 2>&1; else echo "  outbound: NO FILE"; fi; echo "  errors (last 3):"; tail -3 $E 2>/dev/null; echo "  source allow-list:"; grep -E 'aadObjectId.*USER_AAD_ID|YOO_AAD_ID = ' $F | head -2; echo; done; echo '========== JESUS CLAUDE — does it exist? ==========' && ls /home/azureuser/jesus*.py /home/azureuser/.jesus-* 2>&1 | head -10; echo 'systemctl:'; systemctl list-units --type=service --no-pager --plain --no-legend 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'jesus' | head -5; echo 'azure bot resource:'; az resource list --resource-group SDNeurosurgery-OpenClaw --resource-type Microsoft.BotService/botServices --query "[?contains(name,'esus')].name" -o tsv 2>&1; echo 'vault secrets:'; az keyvault secret list --vault-name SDN-YooVault --query "[?contains(name,'jesus')].name" -o tsv 2>&1
